rule_summary: current canonical pullback rule | pullback from prior 20D high between 2% and 15% | extension vs 20DMA between -3% and +6% | no explicit regime or sector-confirmation gate

supportive sector-confirmed controlled pullback | RS 10D >= -1%, RS 20D >= 3%, RS 60D >= 2% | stock outperformed sector over 20D and 60D | close at least 99% of 20DMA | ATR percent <= 5% | within 12% of 52-week high
supportive sector-confirmed pullback | pullback depth 3% to 6% | extension vs 20DMA 0% to +4% | ATR percent <= 5.5%
supportive sector-confirmed pullback | pullback depth 0% to 6% | extension vs 20DMA 0% to +6% | keeps very shallow resets separate from true pullbacks

current trend and RS spine | regime must be Risk-on or Selective risk-on | sector must be confirmed | pullback depth 3% to 10% | extension vs 20DMA -2% to +4% | stock must outperform sector over 20D | ATR percent <= 5.5%
controlled confirmed pullback | regime must be Risk-on
supportive sector-confirmed pullback | pullback depth 6% to 10% | extension vs 20DMA -2% to +4% | tests whether non-deep but larger resets are useful
supportive sector-confirmed leadership | extension vs 20DMA above +6% through +12% | not a live pullback entry; should stay Wait for pullback
